title: Get Media Buy Artifacts Request
description: Request parameters for retrieving content artifacts from a media buy for validation

account.description: Filter artifacts to a specific account. When omitted, returns artifacts across all accessible accounts.

media_buy_id.description: Media buy to get artifacts from

package_ids.description: Filter to specific packages within the media buy

failures_only.description: When true, only return artifacts where the seller's local model returned local_verdict: 'fail'. Useful for auditing false positives. Not useful when the seller does not run a local evaluation model (all verdicts are 'unevaluated').

pagination.description: Pagination parameters. Uses higher limits than standard pagination because artifact result sets can be very large.

max_results.description: Maximum number of artifacts to return per page

cursor.description: Opaque cursor from a previous response to fetch the next page
